title: TWST Stock Earnings: Twist Bioscience Beats EPS, Beats Revenue for Q2 2024
text: Twist Bioscience (NASDAQ: TWST) released its second quarter 2024 financial results, demonstrating performance above analyst expectations on both key metrics. The biotech company reported earnings per share of -79 cents, surpassing the analyst estimate of -81 cents. Revenue reached $75.30 million, representing a 6.58% improvement over the expected $70.65 million. According to the report, Twist Bioscience reported earnings per share of -79 cents which was above the analyst estimate for EPS of -81 cents. The company exceeded revenue projections as well, with actual figures coming in 6.58% better than the analyst estimate for revenue of $70.65 million. InvestorPlace Earnings utilizes data from TradeSmith to automate quarterly earnings report analysis and prioritizes rapid delivery of financial data to investors.
